CustomField.description: The fully qualified name of a custom Apex class that implements the HH_INaming interface for custom Household naming logic. When specified, this class overrides the default naming behavior. Leave blank to use NPPatch's built-in naming engine with the format settings on this object. Only needed for organizations requiring naming logic that cannot be achieved with the standard format tokens.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Custom Apex class implementing HH_INaming for custom naming logic. Leave blank to use the built-in naming engine.
CustomField.label: Implementing Class
